docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,504.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RACKARD, JOANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RACKARD, JOANN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RACKARD, JOANN $1,374.00 PRINCIPAL, $16.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,390.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $11.58 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT RACKARD, JOANN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RACKARD, JOANN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $74.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RACKARD, JOANN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RACKARD, JOANN
